item.title: Legendary Investor Druckenmiller Sells Big Tech, What's His New Top Pick?
item.description: Legendary investor Stanley Druckenmiller has sold off a large portion of his Big Tech stocks, including Microsoft, and is now betting on new AI infrastructure stocks like Coherent and real estate REITs. This analysis delves into the two conflicting perspectives revealed by his portfolio changes: risk aversion and a strategy of selective concentration.
